summaryKo: 이스라엘 방위군에 따르면 후티 반군이 발사한 탄도 미사일이 이스라엘 남부 상공에서 성공적으로 요격됐다.
summaryEn: According to the Israel Defense Force, the ballistic missile launched by the Houthis was successfully intercepted over Southern Israel. OSINTdefender (@sentdefender) The Iranian-backed Houthis in Yemen have decided to officially join the ongoing war on the side of Iran, with sirens currently sounding across Southern Israel due to the launch of a ballistic missile from Yemen. — https://nitter.net/…
